nodes.label: Charge-based gain cell: capacitor C1 holds weight; push-pull transistor emits current ∝ input × Vstore (analog MAC)

nodes.label: Sliding-window causal attention keeps fixed M KV entries, bounding array size; layer stacking recovers global receptive field
